format_name: Purina Pro Plan Veterinary Diets Product List

evidence.reference: external-sample:✔ Proplan PPVD & PPSD Product List 202412 New packing.pdf
evidence.note: I supplied a 3-page Excel-produced PDF sample with Product List, Packs/Case, Size, Supply Price/Pack HK$, Retail Price/Pack HK$, SKU, and Effective from DEC 2024.
I supplied the supplier identity; numeric Rosetta supplier id was not present in the clean checkout.

expected_sections: Purina Pro Plan Veterinary Diets Canine Formula
Purina Pro Plan Veterinary Diets Feline Formula

table_regions.name: proplan_product_rows
table_regions.selector: Rows containing SKU#, Packs / Case, Size, Supply Price / Pack HK$, and Retail Price / Pack HK$
table_regions.notes: Extracted text is table-like but product names span multiple lines.

row_eligibility_rules: Rows with SKU# and Supply Price / Pack are candidate catalogue rows.

pricing.notes: Source header states Supply Price / Pack HK$; wet-can retail values can be printed as case and per-can values and need parser fixtures.

interpretation_rules: Treat Packs / Case as case configuration, not proof that supplier requires case-only purchasing.
Content measures such as 5.5oz (156g) are not sellable-unit counts.
unresolved_semantics: Order increment and break-pack permission are not proven by the source sample.

validation_rules.description: Supply price should be below retail price when both are comparable pack prices.
validation_rules.review_guidance: Confirm whether retail was printed per pack, per case, or per can before applying this as a blocking rule.

evidence.reference: external-sample:✔ Proplan PPVD & PPSD Product List 202412 New packing.pdf
evidence.note: I supplied a 3-page Excel-produced PDF sample with Product List, Packs/Case, Size, Supply Price/Pack HK$, Retail Price/Pack HK$, SKU, and Effective from DEC 2024.
I supplied the supplier identity; numeric Rosetta supplier id was not present in the clean checkout.

known_ambiguities.condition: Some wet-can rows print retail as case and per-can values while supply price is per pack.
known_ambiguities.review_guidance: Create row fixtures for dry, supplement, and wet-can rows before promotion to SUPPORTED.
